# Moumantai Clients

Each `clients/<id>/Taskfile.yml` is the SSOT for that client's metadata + tasks. This table is generated from those manifests; do not edit by hand.

- `task --list-all` (from repo root) — every task across every workspace.
- Conventions (taxonomy, adding a new client, multi-variant guidance) live in [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md).

| ID | Form factor | Platform | Name | Stack |
|----|-------------|----------|------|-------|
| `android` | phone | android | Android phone | Kotlin 2.0.21 + Compose M3 (BoM 2024.10.01) + AGP 8.7.3 |
| `esp32` | hmi-panel | esp32-s3 | CrowPanel Advance 3.5" HMI | ESP-IDF v5.4 + LVGL 9 + C |
| `pwa` | phone | browser | Progressive Web App (Tailscale-served phone client) | React 18 + Vite 6 + vite-plugin-pwa + Vitest 4 |
| `wear-os` | watch | wear-os | Wear OS watch | Kotlin 2.0.21 + Wear Compose Material 3 1.6.1 + Compose BoM 2024.01.00 + AGP 8.7.3 |
